name: Bruce Firmware (BETA)
author: pr3y-dev
description: Bruce is a custom firmware for the M5Stack Carduputer, designed to enhance its functionality and user experience. This beta version includes new features and improvements over the stock firmware.

name: Camillia-MT (Pager)
author: Michael A. Cojocari
description: Meshtastic-compatible mesh radio firmware for ESP32-S3 handheld LoRa devices. Features 8 configurable LoRa channels, DMs, GPS, web configuration UI, YAML config via microSD, themes, and traceroute.

name: Launcher (T-LoraPager)
author: bmorcelli
description: With this app you can turn your device into a swiss knife, loading any .bin you have on your SD Card or wirelessly downloading from M5Burner repo or from your computer/smartphone through its WebUI.

name: MeshOS (T-LoraPager)
author: meshcore
description: Easy to use, smartphone-like MeshCore experience. Activate your license on: https://meshcore.co.uk/activate.html

author: Meshtastic
description: An open source, off-grid, decentralized mesh network built to run on affordable, low-power devices. No cell towers. No internet. Just pure peer-to-peer connectivity.
name: Meshtastic
Tactility (Pager)
author: bytewelder
description:
Tactility is an operating system that focuses on the ESP32 microcontroller family.
 See https://tactilityproject.org for more information.

name: Trail Mate (SX1262)
author: vicliu624
description: Trail Mate is an offline‑first handheld system for GPS navigation, multi-protocol communication (Meshtastic / MeshCore / Reticulum), and real‑time team situational awareness in no‑network environments.

name: WADAMESH (T-LoRa Pager (LR1121))
author: ALLFATHER-BV
description: MeshCore companion radio with a full touch UI for the LilyGo T-Deck — LoRa mesh DMs, channels & room servers, contacts, offline maps, and multi-language keyboards.

name: WADAMESH (T-LoRa Pager (SX1262))
author: ALLFATHER-BV
description: MeshCore companion radio with a full touch UI for the LilyGo T-Deck — LoRa mesh DMs, channels & room servers, contacts, offline maps, and multi-language keyboards.

name: WADAMESH BETA (T-LoRa Pager (LR1121))
author: ALLFATHER-BV
description: Test builds of WADAMESH — the newest features before they reach the stable channel, less tested. For everyday use install the stable WADAMESH entry instead. MeshCore companion radio with a full touch UI for the LilyGo T-Deck.
